text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer. Sorry to spring this on you out of
nowhere, but would you happen to be free
tomorrow?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to volunteer at the hospital tomorrow,
and I was wondering if you'd like to come with.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
There are a lot of long-term patients there, and I
thought they might feel comforted by the sight of
your gentle smile.
choice_data_list: I'd love to go with you!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Great! Then, I'll see you tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Young Patient
text_block_list.text:
It's an Umamusume! Wow, your tail's so pretty!
Are you fast at running?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Indeed I am! How about I give you a
demonstration next time? I can even outrun a car,
you know.

text_block_list.name: Young Patient
text_block_list.text: Whaaat? You've gotta be lying! There's no way you can run that fast! Hehe!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hello there. Is the sun too bright? Here, let me
close the curtains for—

text_block_list.name: Female Patient
text_block_list.text:
Don't force yourself. Being with me will only ruin
your mood, so go away and find someone who
wants your company.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For every person who smiles brightly with all their
heart, there's another with their gaze locked on
their feet, who refuses to lift their head.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fuji Kiseki's charming smile doesn't falter for a
single second throughout the entire visit, but
when it's over, she confesses something quietly.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I actually planned to pull a surprise during our
visit to cheer everyone up, but...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I couldn't go through with it. Not when they're all
burdened with so many different thoughts and
emotions.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Even a smile might cause them pain instead.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I never realized how much of a burden the act of
cheering someone up puts on them. I'm still so
naive...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: But...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
It's all right. I'd like to stay with you. After all, you
chose to meet me even though you could have
refused.

text_block_list.name: Female Patient
text_block_list.text:
...You want to stay even if I have nothing but
negative things to say?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
There's no end to my joy simply knowing that
you're willing to talk to me. It doesn't matter what
we talk about.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I'm so happy that I came here and was able to
meet you today.

text_block_list.name: Female Patient
text_block_list.text:
I thought you were here to cheer me up, but
you're the one feeling happy now? Hehe. I see.

text_block_list.name: Female Patient
text_block_list.text:
So even I still have the ability to make others
happy...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: She told me she'll come watch me race sometime.

text_block_list.name: Female Patient
text_block_list.text:
If the person that I made happy went on to win a
race... Now, that'd be a real miracle!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
My goal is always to make people smile. Even
now, that hasn't changed.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
But there are so many more ways that can play
out than I ever imagined.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: That's why, I...
choice_data_list: You want to show her a true miracle, right?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Exactly!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I didn't make her happy or put a smile on her
face... She did that for me. And then requested
that I continue to win races.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
And to do that, I'll put my all into every race. I'll
do everything I can to meet those expectations
and show her the miracle she desires!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fuji Kiseki grins as she makes her declaration. Her
profile glows just as brightly and boldly as the
blazing sun hanging in the sky.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Not at all. In fact, I feel more motivated than
ever!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
So long as I bear my miraculous name, I'll win
every race I enter for sure!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I grin mischievously like the way she always does
and say that winning every race "for sure" will kill
the surprise.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha! Yes, that's true. I guess just winning my
races won't cut it, then.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I'll have to bewitch everyone with my
performance and give them the show of a lifetime
while I'm at it!
